title: Write a Least-Privilege IAM Policy
description:
## Read-Only to One Bucket

Least privilege means granting exactly the actions and resources needed — nothing more.

**Your task:** write an IAM policy at **`/root/policy.json`** that allows **only** **`s3:GetObject`** on the objects of the bucket **`my-reports`** (resource ARN `arn:aws:s3:::my-reports/*`), with `Effect: Allow`.

> 💡 The resource for object-level S3 actions is the bucket ARN with `/*`. Keep it to the single action.

hints.title: Scoped Allow statement
hints.body: Allow s3:GetObject on the bucket's object ARN only.

validation.description: Checks for an Allow of s3:GetObject scoped to the my-reports bucket.

commands.command: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/root/policy.json')); s=d['Statement']; s=s if isinstance(s,list) else [s]; ok=any(st.get('Effect')=='Allow' and 's3:GetObject' in (st['Action'] if isinstance(st['Action'],list) else [st['Action']]) for st in s); print('ok' if ok else 'no')"

commands.description: Scoped to the my-reports bucket ARN
